user.title: Assist Shortcuts
user.description: Configure which device domains to control when an area or floor command is spoken (e.g. "living room off"). Entity-level commands (e.g. "cloud off") always target that specific entity regardless of this setting.

data.domains: Domains to control for area / floor commands

init.title: Assist Shortcuts options
init.description: Choose which domains are toggled when you say an area or floor name.

data.domains: Domains to control for area / floor commands
